name: Detection on Demand
description: This app integrates with FireEye's Detection on Demand service to identify malicious files and hashes

actions.name: Detonate File
actions.description: Execute a file in FireEye's various detection engines to determine what malicious behaviors, if any, the file exhibits

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: Vault ID of file to detonate

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Password to be used by the detection engine to decrypt a password protected file

parameters.name: param
parameters.description: Command line parameter(s) to be used by detection engine when running the file. Mainly applicable to .exe files. For example, setting param to "start -h localhost -p 5555" will make the detection engine run a file named "malicious.exe" as "malicious.exe start -h localhost -p 5555"

actions.name: Detonate Url
actions.description: Send a URL to Detection on Demand to scan for malicious behavior and artifacts

actions.name: Lookup Hash
actions.description: Search FireEye's hash database to see if there is already a report on the file

parameters.name: md5_hash
parameters.description: The MD5 hash of the file to investigate

actions.name: Get Report
actions.description: Get a detailed report on the execution results of a submitted file

parameters.name: report_id
parameters.description: ID of the report to view

parameters.name: presigned_url_expiry
parameters.description: Number of hours to let the presigned URL be active for

parameters.name: poll_interval
parameters.description: Number of seconds to wait between each request to get the report

parameters.name: poll_attempts
parameters.description: Total number of attempts to fetch the report before failing
